summary: Iteration 118 - Full App Audit across 12 tasks. All tasks PASS. Verified via grep commands and browser testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 12 tasks verified. See verified_features for details.

TASK_1a_email_purple_colors.details: grep -c '7c3aed' returns 0, grep -c '7C3AED' returns 0. Only #3b82f6 at line 2084 for IN_PROGRESS status (semantic color, not button).

TASK_2_portal_branding.details: portal.ts returns brandPrimaryColor and brandLogoUrl (lines 130-131, 266-267). ClientPortal.tsx uses dynamic brandColor variable for gradient (line 456). Footer says 'Thank you for working with {studioName}.' (line 992). Header shows studio initial letter when no brandLogoUrl (line 464).

TASK_3_trust_signal_font.details: ClientPortal.tsx trust signal uses 'Inter, system-ui, sans-serif' (line 883). data-testid='signing-trust-signal' exists (line 879).

TASK_4_public_quote_number_color.details: PublicQuote.tsx quote number uses style={{ color: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.6)' }} (line 208). data-testid='public-quote' (line 200) and data-testid='download-pdf-btn' (line 216) exist.

TASK_5_sidebar_typography.details: Dashboard.tsx sidebar section headers (Workspace, Schedule, Account) use text-[10px] (lines 428, 454, 464). User block subtitle uses text-[11px] (line 422).

TASK_6_beta_plan_card.details: Dashboard.tsx shows 'Beta Access' (line 488), '$97 one-time' (line 489), 'Founding member' (line 490). Browser test confirmed all three texts visible in sidebar.

TASK_7_public_quote_status_labels.details: PublicQuote.tsx shows 'Awaiting your response' (line 230) and 'Awaiting your review' (line 231).

TASK_9_submit_inquiry_no_duplicate.details: SubmitInquiry.tsx has only 1 occurrence of value: 'WEB_DESIGN'. UI/UX Design uses 'GRAPHIC_DESIGN' value (line 28).

TASK_10_lead_detail_currency.details: LeadDetailModal.tsx accepts currencySymbol prop (line 80, 163) and uses it (lines 669, 1637). Dashboard.tsx passes currencySymbol={user?.currencySymbol || '$'} (line 1350).

TASK_12_portfolio_category_enum.details: api.ts PortfolioCategory includes 'ILLUSTRATION' and 'FINE_ART' (lines 405-406). PORTFOLIO_CATEGORY_LABELS has labels for both (lines 486-487). Backend schema.prisma has ILLUSTRATION and FINE_ART in PortfolioCategory enum (lines 711-712, 772-773, 816-817).

login_flow.details: Login with bookingtest@test.com / password123 successful, redirects to /dashboard.
